title: genoplesium baueri
intro: Genoplesium baueri, also known as the Rough Spider Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to eastern Australia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoid glycosides and phenolic compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The Rough Spider Orchid is believed to have health benefits, such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions like arthritis and cancer. Genoplesium baueri is typically harvested for its roots, which are then used to prepare herbal extracts and teas, although its usage is heavily regulated due to conservation concerns.
